@@ -509,0 +509,3 @@ +

Note that if the $MSYSTEM_CHOST environment variable in +your MSYS2 is set to x86_64-pc-cygwin, pass +--build=x86_64-pc-msys to configure.

@@ -314,0 +314,3 @@
+Note that if the `$MSYSTEM_CHOST` environment variable in your MSYS2
+is set to `x86_64-pc-cygwin`, pass `--build=x86_64-pc-msys` to `configure`.
+
